rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"withAuth catch block uses `authContext.status ?? 401`, silently coercing any thrown status to 401 even when the underlying service threw a different code.","scope":"src/auth/withAuth.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Complete auth flow coverage requires both unit tests (HOC 401/403/200 behavior, role inheritance, optional token mode) and integration tests (register→login→protected route→refresh→logout).","scope":"auth testing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use `makeAuthenticatedContext()` helper to create user+tokens+sessions for test context, consistent across all auth test files.","scope":"auth testing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use `vi.mock('@/getPayload')` to mock Payload instance for AuthService unit tests.","scope":"auth testing"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Integration tests under `tests/int/` (not `src/`) for end-to-end auth flow; unit tests under `src/auth/` next to the module they test.","scope":"auth testing"}]}
